tagline: Your Backyard Oasis - You Dream It, We Make It Happen

hero.headline:
Award-Winning Pools Built for
Your Family
hero.subheadline: For 16 years, EverClear Pools & Spas has turned Northern NJ backyards into private retreats. From custom gunite builds to weekly maintenance, we handle every detail so you just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: From Dream Design to<br class="hidden md:block"> Crystal-Clear Water
services.subtitle: Whether you want a brand-new custom pool or need expert weekly care, EverClear is your single source for everything pools and spas in Northern New Jersey.

cards.title: Custom Gunite Pools
cards.description: Individually designed gunite pools built with award-winning craftsmanship. From freeform lagoons to sleek modern designs, we bring your vision to life.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Breathe new life into your existing pool with expert resurfacing, new tile and coping, updated plumbing, and modern automation upgrades.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive valet service including chemical balancing, skimming, vacuuming, and equipment checks. Your pool stays swim-ready every week.

cards.title: Spa & Hot Tub Installation
cards.description: Custom-designed spas integrated with your pool or as standalone retreats. Year-round relaxation built to last.

cards.title: Equipment Repair
cards.description: Fast diagnosis and repair of heaters, pumps, filters, and salt systems. Most repairs completed same-visit by certified technicians.

cards.title: Pool Decking & Landscaping
cards.description: Premium pool decks and integrated landscape design that transform your entire backyard into a cohesive outdoor living space.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Call us or fill out the form. We'll visit your property, listen to your vision, and provide an honest quote within 48 hours. No pressure, no obligations.

steps.title: We Design & Build
steps.description: Our NESPA award-winning team creates a custom design tailored to your space and budget. CPO-certified technicians handle every detail from permits to final finish.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Oasis
steps.description: Dive into your new backyard paradise. And with our ongoing maintenance plans, your pool stays pristine season after season without you lifting a finger.

about.label: Why NJ Families Choose EverClear
about.headline: Owner-Operated, Award-Winning, Built on Relationships
about.description: Founded by Jason Werner in 2010, EverClear Pools & Spas has grown from a local operation into Northern New Jersey's most trusted pool contractor. With 8 consecutive NESPA Outstanding Achievement Awards, an A+ BBB rating, and 484+ five-star reviews, our reputation is built on one thing: treating every client like family. We don't just build pools — we build lasting relationships and backyard memories.

features.title: 8x NESPA Award Winner
features.description: Recognized for outstanding achievement in pool design and construction every year from 2017 to 2024.

features.title: One Company, Total Care
features.description: From new construction to weekly maintenance and repairs, EverClear handles everything so you never need to call anyone else.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with any service? We come back and make it right at no charge. Our 484+ five-star reviews speak for themselves.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets an upfront, detailed quote. No hidden fees, no change-order games — just honest pricing from a team you can trust.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, we come back and redo it at no cost. If your new pool doesn't match the design we agreed on, we make it right — period. That's the EverClear promise, backed by 16 years and 484+ five-star reviews.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a new pool?
faqs.answer: Most custom gunite pool projects take 8-12 weeks from design approval to completion, depending on complexity and permits. Vinyl liner pools can be completed in 4-6 weeks. We keep you updated at every stage.

faqs.question: Do you service pools you didn't build?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our weekly maintenance plans are available for any pool in our service area, regardless of who built it. We'll assess your pool's condition and set up a care plan tailored to your system.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. All technicians hold Certified Pool & Spa Operator (CPO) credentials and OSHA safety training. They are fully insured and background-checked for your peace of mind.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve all of Northern New Jersey including Passaic County, Bergen County, Morris County, and surrounding areas. We also serve Orange County, New York. Call us to confirm coverage in your area.

faqs.question: Do you handle permits and inspections?
faqs.answer: Yes, we manage the entire permitting process and coordinate all required inspections. Our team handles the paperwork and municipal requirements so you don't have to.

testimonials.name: Long-Term Customer
testimonials.text: I have been using Everclear for 3 years. I can't say enough great things about them. The office staff, management, and maintenance team are all incredibly professional.

testimonials.name: Loyal Client
testimonials.text: Their quality of work product and customer service is outstanding. They are consistent and pay great attention to detail across routine service, repairs, and customer inquiries.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Homeowner
testimonials.text: Eric and Charles are amazing - very friendly, helpful and professional. They make sure our pool is in great shape each week for an enjoyable fun-filled summer.
